---
title: "Wildlife"
lightbox: true
---

See here <https://www.birds-online.ch/general/conditions>

::: {layout-ncol="2"}
![text\
© 2025. This work is openly licensed via [CC BY-NC 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/)](images/wl1.jpg){group="wildlife"}

![text\
© 2025. This work is openly licensed via [CC BY-NC 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/)](photos/wl2.jpg){group="wildlife"}

![text\
© 2025. This work is openly licensed via [CC BY-NC 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/)](photos/wl3.jpg){group="wildlife"}

![text\
© 2025. This work is openly licensed via [CC BY-NC 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/)](photos/wl4.jpg){group="wildlife"}
:::
